case_title: RODRIGO TAVORA DE OLIVEIRA VS. 399 FREMONT UDR APARTMENTS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF RODRIGO TAVORA DE OLIVEIRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT UDR APARTMENTS IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. SERVICE IS FOUND TO BE PROPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,650.94 FILED BY OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO TAVORA DE AS TO DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT UDR APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2021 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED NOV-18-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT UDR APARTMENTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO TAVORA DE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT UDR APARTMENTS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.00, DEFENDANT MUST CEASE ANY FURTHER INVOICES TO PLAINTIFF EFFECTIVE THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
